description:
On the next This is my Architecture Video, Masa from Cookpad explains how they built scalable and flexible security architecture to monitor and analyze security log data in a cost-effective manner using AWS services. You learn three parts of architecture: 

1) COLLECTION security logs through AWS services such as Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose, AWS CloudTrail, and AWS Lambda. 
2) RETENTION of the logs in Amazon S3 to be managed by Amazon S3 lifecycle policies. 
3) ANALYSIS of the logs to be inspected by AWS Lambda to raise alert, to be stored in Amazon Elasticsearch Service to analyze, and to be searched by Amazon Athena for audit. 
You also learn how beneficial AWS managed services are to achieve both low latency and data integrity with low cost, and collect diverse log data easily without schema using S3.

~Filmed prior to COVID-19~
